release_review.summary: Runtime maintenance routing now flows through an explicit Desktop/Env App maintenance context, while SSH restart and update actions still rely on the same runtime service compatibility window.
release_review.same_window_rationale: This release changes who owns maintenance routing and runtime attach decisions, not the runtime protocol wire contract itself. The compatibility window stays valid because the protocol version, compatibility epoch, and minimum Desktop and Runtime versions are unchanged, and the reviewed surfaces cover the affected attach, health, startup, settings, and SSH bootstrap paths.
checked_surfaces: Runtime Service snapshot capability and binding state normalization
Desktop shell runtime maintenance context IPC and action resolution
Desktop SSH attach, restart, and update runtime ownership validation
Desktop AI Broker runtime-control binding RPC and final runtime identity checks
Env App maintenance controller and settings action routing
Env App local runtime health and startup report carriers
Env App sys.ping runtime service payload and compatibility rendering
SSH-managed runtime bootstrap restart and update flow
